calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Delivery Of Property And Award Of Reasonable Attorney'S Fees; Declaration Of Jeffrey D. Davine In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jim French for HSBC Bank. Jeffrey Davine appeared by telephone for California Polytechnic State University, San Luis Obispo.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The Petition to Compel Delivery of Property and Award of Reasonable Attorney's Fees was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Ms. Thaete will appear by telephone.
